Who We Are

Local. Reliable. Dedicated.

Avilas Vending Services is a locally owned and operated company proudly serving Wenatchee, Washington and surrounding communities. We partner with businesses of all sizes to provide top-quality vending machines stocked with snacks, beverages, and essentials your team loves — at absolutely no cost to you.

From initial setup to regular restocking and repairs, we take care of every detail so you can focus on running your business. We believe every workplace deserves a great vending experience.

Get a Free Machine
🤝
No-Cost Placement
We provide and install machines at zero cost. You supply the space, we handle everything else.
🔧
Full-Service Maintenance
Our team handles all repairs, cleaning, and upkeep so your machine always looks and works great.
📦
Regular Restocking
We monitor inventory and restock on schedule so items never run out.
🏡
Community Focused
As a Wenatchee local business, we take pride in supporting the community we call home.
Our Equipment

Our Vending Machines

We offer a range of modern, reliable vending machines to fit any business environment — from compact snack dispensers to full combo units with beverages and food.

⭐ Most Popular
Refrigerated Combo Units
Our flagship glass-door refrigerated machines offer maximum visibility and a premium look. Perfect for offices, gyms, and high-traffic areas. Holds beverages, dairy, healthy snacks, and more — all kept perfectly chilled.
🍿 Snacks
Snack Machine
High-capacity snack vending stocked with chips, candy, crackers, granola bars, and more. 5 full rows of your team's favorites.
🥤 Beverages
Beverage Machine
Stocked with sodas, waters, energy drinks, juices, and sports drinks. Accepts all payment types including cards and mobile pay.
🔀 Combo
Combo Machine
Snacks on top, beverages on the bottom — the perfect all-in-one solution for smaller spaces that need both options in a single unit.
What We Offer

Our Services

A complete range of vending solutions tailored to any business environment and workforce size.

🆓
Free Machine Placement
We deliver and install your vending machine at zero cost. No contracts, no hidden fees.
  • Delivery & Setup Included
  • Professional Installation
  • Multiple Machine Types
📦
Stocking & Restocking
We keep your machine full with fresh, in-demand products on a reliable schedule.
  • Scheduled Refills
  • Custom Product Requests
  • Emergency Restocking
🔧
Maintenance & Repair
Our team responds fast to any issues — keeping your machine clean and working perfectly.
  • Fast Response Time
  • Routine Cleaning
  • Parts & Labor Covered
💳
Modern Payment Options
Our machines accept all payment methods so every customer can make a purchase easily.
  • Cash & Coins
  • Credit & Debit Cards
  • Apple Pay & Google Pay
🎯
Custom Product Selection
We work with you to stock what your employees and customers actually want to buy.
  • Brand Preferences
  • Healthy Options Available
  • Seasonal Offerings
📊
Inventory Monitoring
We track sales data and inventory so your machine is always optimally stocked.
  • Real-Time Stock Tracking
  • Sales Reports Available
  • Proactive Refills
Simple Process

How It Works

Getting a vending machine for your location is fast, free, and completely hassle-free.

01
📞
Contact Us
Reach out by phone, email, or the form below. Tell us about your location and needs.
02
🔍
Site Visit
We visit your location to find the best machine placement and product selection for your team.
03
🚚
Free Installation
We deliver and install the machine at no charge. Setup is quick and we handle everything.
04
✅
We Maintain It
Sit back and relax. We restock regularly, respond fast, and keep your machine running perfectly.

The Avilas Difference
